scenarios.title: [PL-1] - Check that adding a product increments the cart badge count @positive
scenarios.userAction: Click the add-to-cart button on the third product (Wool Beanie in the mocked API response) and verify that the cart badge in the page header updates to show '1'.
expectedAssertions: after clicking add-to-cart on Wool Beanie: cart badge text equals '1'

scenarios.title: [PL-2] - Check that removing the only cart item shows the empty-cart message @positive @edge
scenarios.userAction: Add the first product (Linen Tee) to the cart, open the cart drawer, remove the item, and verify that the cart drawer shows the empty-state message.
expectedAssertions: after removing Linen Tee from the cart drawer: empty-cart message is visible in the drawer

locatorTable.notes: article role is common for product cards but unverified. Reviewer: check element semantics or request data-testid='product-card'.
Mock positions Wool Beanie at index 2; name-based filter decouples from DOM order. See pin 1.
Common accessible label; multiple buttons per card are possible. nth(0) is ambiguous. See pin 2.
Deeply structural path; data-testid='cart-count' is guessed from common convention. See pin 3.
Mock places Linen Tee at index 0. Same reasoning as nth(2) row. See pin 1.
Structural index selector; cart icon may be a button rather than a link. See pin 4.
Cart drawer testid assumed; listitem scope within drawer assumed. See pin 5.
'Remove' is the industry-standard accessible label; nth(1) implies another button at index 0 (possibly a quantity control). See pin 6.
Exact empty-state copy is unknown; regex covers the most common variation. See pin 7.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Product card element and product name filter
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: product card element role not confirmed — assumed article
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Verify semantic element type; if not article, ask FE team to add data-testid='product-card' to each card.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Add-to-cart button within a product card
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved: add-to-cart button accessible name not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add aria-label='Add to cart' or data-testid='add-to-cart-button' to the button.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Cart badge count in the page header
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q4 unresolved: cart-count testid not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Add data-testid='cart-count' to the badge span element; or fall back to page.locator('header').locator('[aria-label*="cart" i]').

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Cart icon / navigation element in the header
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: cart icon role (link vs button) not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If element is a button, use getByRole('button', { name: /cart/i }); if icon-only, add aria-label='Open cart'.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Cart drawer panel scope and item
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q6 unresolved: cart-drawer testid not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Add data-testid='cart-drawer' to the slide-out panel element; or fall back to page.locator('.cart-drawer') CSS scoping with a WHY-comment.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Remove item button within a cart drawer list item
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q7 unresolved: remove button accessible name not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If button has a different label ('Delete', 'x', or aria-hidden icon), add aria-label='Remove item' or data-testid='remove-item-button'.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Empty-cart message in the cart drawer
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q8 unresolved: empty-cart message copy not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm app's empty-cart wording; or add data-testid='cart-empty-message' and switch to getByTestId.
